name: Baking Powder Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 450°F. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan or a small baking sheet.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt. Add the vegetable shortening and mix with your fingers until evenly coated with flour.
Break the shortening into 5 or 6 smaller pieces. Rub the flour and shortening together until the mixture forms irregular lumps (about 1-2 minutes).
Add the milk all at once and stir until moistened, ensuring no dry spots remain.
Turn the dough onto a floured surface and knead 10 times.
Pat the dough into a circle about 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick. Cut with a two-inch cookie cutter and place on the prepared pan with space between each biscuit.
Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until lightly browned. Serve hot with butter and honey.
Yield: 15 biscuits
